reforms.description: Turkey aims to conduct an in-depth review of incentives to R&D to further boost R&D investment of businesses while streamlining various R&D incentive schemes based on cost-benefit analyses and international best practices to improve the efficiency and impact of tax subsidies and grants.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Boosting R&D investment is expected to enhance innovation and productivity in the private sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform involves significant changes to R&D incentives but does not constitute a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The level of gross domestic spending on R&D per GDP remains low. Consider conducting an in-depth review of incentives to R&D to further boost R&D investment of businesses while ensuring a level-playing field for competition.

reforms.description: Turkey's National Development Plan for 2019-2023 aims to enhance the business support system by promoting innovation, easing access to finance, and providing incentives for investments in specific regions and sectors.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the business support system is expected to stimulate innovation and investment, contributing to economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The plan has been implemented as part of Turkey's strategic initiatives.
reforms.importance_rationale: This plan represents a significant structural change in the approach to business support and innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The support system aims at, inter alia, promoting exports and internationalisation, fostering innovation and easing access to finance for firms of all sizes.

reforms.description: The Turkish government plans to introduce a comprehensive Incentive and Aid Information System to streamline business support programs and enhance transparency and efficiency.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving transparency and efficiency in business support programs is expected to enhance the effectiveness of innovation incentives.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: While significant, this reform is more about improving existing systems rather than introducing a major new initiative.
reforms.source_quote: The development of such a system goes hand in hand with plans to form a comprehensive legal and regulatory framework for aid and simplifying the current structure.

reforms.description: The 'New Economy Programme 2021-2023' aims to address shortcomings in Turkey's business environment, enhance digital skills, and foster e-trade, while also attracting foreign direct investment and improving environmental sustainability.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing the business environment and digital skills is expected to stimulate innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The program has been implemented as part of Turkey's strategic initiatives.
reforms.importance_rationale: This program represents a significant initiative to transform the business landscape in Turkey.
reforms.source_quote: The New Economy Programme aimed at addressing a number of shortcomings in the business environment, in the entrepreneurial eco-system, in Turkey’s digital skills and in the flexibility of the labour market.

reforms.description: The '2023 Industry and Technology Strategy' aims to reinvigorate the entrepreneurship ecosystem by easing the registration of start-ups and closing failing businesses, addressing rigid regulations on the labour market and simplifying the business subsidy and corporate tax system.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Reinvigorating the entrepreneurship ecosystem is expected to enhance innovation and economic dynamism.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This strategy represents a comprehensive approach to reforming the entrepreneurship landscape in Turkey.
reforms.source_quote: Recent policy initiatives like the '2023 Industry and Technology Strategy'... intend to reinvigorate the entrepreneurship ecosystem by easing the registration of start-ups and closing of failing businesses.

reforms.description: Turkey provides one of the most generous tax incentive schemes to R&D investments across OECD countries, significantly boosting R&D investments and employment in R&D-related activities since their introduction in 2008.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The generous tax incentives have led to increased R&D investments, fostering innovation and job creation in the sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax incentive scheme has been in effect since 2008 and continues to operate.
reforms.importance_rationale: This scheme has had a significant impact on R&D investment levels in Turkey.
reforms.source_quote: Turkey provides one of the most generous tax incentive schemes to R&D investments across OECD countries.

reforms.description: Turkey has introduced a tax allowance for newly issued corporate equity, aimed at reducing the reliance on debt for financing investments, expected to stimulate equity capital demand, particularly among SMEs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Stimulating equity capital demand is expected to enhance investment and innovation among SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The tax allowance has been in effect since its introduction in 2015.
reforms.importance_rationale: While beneficial, this reform is a targeted adjustment rather than a major overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Turkey has addressed the debt-bias of the corporate tax system by introducing an allowance for newly issued corporate equity in 2015.

reforms.description: The Turkish government has initiated a 'Digitalisation Strategy' as part of its 2023 Industry and Technology Strategy, aimed at enhancing the digital capabilities of SMEs, including support mechanisms to measure and improve companies' readiness for digitalisation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital capabilities is expected to improve competitiveness and innovation among SMEs.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been officially announced but not yet implemented.
reforms.importance_rationale: This strategy is significant but is part of a broader initiative rather than a standalone major reform.
reforms.source_quote: The 'Digitalisation Strategy' will include solutions and support mechanisms for enterprises of all sizes.

reforms.description: Turkey's National Cyber Security Strategy and Action Plan aims to enhance digital skills in education by integrating cybersecurity content into school curricula and increasing the number of graduates in related programs.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Enhancing digital skills in education is expected to build a skilled workforce capable of supporting innovation and cybersecurity.
reforms.status_evidence: The strategy has been implemented as part of Turkey's educational reforms.
reforms.importance_rationale: This strategy represents a significant investment in human capital for innovation.
reforms.source_quote: The National Cyber Security Strategy and Action Plan includes strategic goals to increase basic and advanced digital skills.
